channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: No bin collection this weekend so far in the Children's Playground., 26th April
item.description:
As above. Children are having to play surrounded by litter of all kinds. People have tried to use the bins but, without tops on the bins, the squirrels foxes have had fun.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Seymour Villas, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burnt out scooter, 26th April
item.description:
There was a burnt out trolley in the middle of the meadows. I’ve collected lots of the bits and put them in the bin, but the main part of it wouldn’t fit so I’ve left it next to the bin for collection. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Andrew's Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin overflowing again, 26th April
item.description:
Constant problem as detailed many times previously. One idea would be to empty the bin daily???
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heathfield Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mest on boardwalk a trip hazard., 26th April
item.description:
The mesh on the boardwalk has come loose and is a trip hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead pigeon, 26th April
item.description:
Dead pigeon on the pavement under the bridge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Furniture dumped on footpath again..., 26th April
item.description:
... outside number 47. Please clear this obstacle from the footpath. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace Grove, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: Damaged road sign, 26th April
item.description:
Outside 36 Honley Road there is a damaged road sign.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Honley Road, Hither Green, Greater London

item.title: Illegal parking, 26th April
item.description:
Continually parked here. Disabled badge, but no timer displayed making it non compliant.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ness Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pitch surface damage, 26th April
item.description:
Someone has damaged the football pitch which has resulted my kids hurting themselves in pitch this needs to be fixed ASAP

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe New Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Path is raised., 26th April
item.description:
Parts of the path are raised.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Way, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Accident on road has caused rubble on pathway and road where car has rammed into cement at rear of our garden, 26th April
item.description:
Metropolitan police notice CAD 488/20APR26 vehicle collided with the rear of our garden which faces onto Rectory Lane, Cement was damaged, strewn across pavement and road along with pieces of metal which came off car. Neighbour opposite had his wall broken. have reported this via June Slaughter but not heard anything. The cement area, pavement, road belongs to highways but had it not been there the car would have broken down our fence and entered our garden.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Lane, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Taking electric car charging bay, 26th April
item.description:
I wanted to charge my electric car but a non charging vehicle took the space.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Hicks Street, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mapes house main entrance, 26th April
item.description:
Entry door bell jammed so ringing constantly and not working Reported 14 April but not resolved Right hand lift not going up
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kimberley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Back door doest work, 26th April
item.description:
Back door doesn't open with the key fob that is meant to work
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe New Road, Bermondsey, Greater London

item.title: Usual fly tipping, 26th April
item.description:
Usual fly tipping but higher today

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Road, London

item.title: Leff house bib store and garage, 26th April
item.description:
Flooding under Bin store cupboard and in garages (reported multiple times by residents but no action taken)
